## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for AI Content Manager role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ifeoluwa has 5+ years of content experience, including SEO writing, content management, and experimenting with AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [GrowthX seeks content managers who can optimize processes/workflows, not just write content](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Key skills: proactive problem-solving, attention to detail, and ability to improve content pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [2-month trial period before potential full-time role](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

## Topics

### Matthew's Role and GrowthX Overview

  - [Chief Content Officer overseeing content managers and client work quality](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Focus on improving processes, product, and tooling for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Background: 10 years as Editor-in-Chief at TechCrunch](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)

### Ifeoluwa's Background

  - [5 years in content, starting as a product reviewer for freelance news sites](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Worked at We Write Blog Posts agency (2021-2023), sharpening SEO skills](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [SEO Writer/Content Manager at PiggyVest (Nigerian fintech company)](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Tripled traffic in first 3 months at PiggyVest through content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Worked with VC company, growing traffic from 0 to 1000 daily visits in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Content Process Optimization

  - [Ifeoluwa experimented with Gemini to scale content production at PiggyVest](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Created SOP documents and fed context to AI to generate initial drafts](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Reduced article writing time from 8 hours to 2-3 hours](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Increased output from 2 to 5 high-quality articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### GrowthX Content Manager Role

  - [Focus on process improvement and workflow optimization, not just writing](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Understanding of "context engineering" for AI tools is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Need to articulate issues in content pipelines and suggest improvements](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Balance between client-specific needs and best practices in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

### Content Quality Evaluation

  - [Consider client expectations and desires alongside best practices](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Key elements: clear topics, concise conclusions, AIO/SEO readiness](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Importance of transitionary sentences between sections](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
  - ["Texture" in content - balancing dense copy with visual breaks (e.g., bullet points)](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1927.0)

### Expectations for Trial Period

  - [Proactive agency - taking initiative to solve problems and improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [Attention to detail in deliverables to build trust with clients and team](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
  - [Willingness to experiment and prototype solutions using available tools](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ifeoluwa to begin 2-month trial period if selected](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Focus on demonstrating proactive problem-solving and attention to detail](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2163.0)
  - [Leverage documentation and existing processes while seeking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Prepare to contribute ideas for optimizing content creation pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/VyDrBqdp-yDzd7JaooywsTu4LgnqFT9N?tab=summary&timestamp=2597.0)
